assertions.assertion: Mentions DefaultClockSkew as the relevant setting
assertions.rationale: DefaultClockSkew is explicitly mentioned as the relevant setting.
options.Saml.DefaultClockSkew = TimeSpan.FromMinutes(10) is shown in code.

assertions.assertion: Suggests increasing the value beyond the default 5 minutes
assertions.rationale: Suggests increasing to 10 or 15 minutes from the default 5.

assertions.assertion: Does NOT suggest changes to the OIDC/OAuth configuration — this is SAML-specific
assertions.rationale: Explicitly states this is SAML-specific under options.Saml and does not affect OIDC/OAuth.
